$description: GNAP Task — Agent 间协调的工作单元

template.title: string (required) — brief task description
template.status: string — created | assigned | running | completed | failed | cancelled
template.assigned_at: string — ISO8601, when agent claimed the task
template.completed_at: string — ISO8601, when task reached terminal status

files: array of file paths to operate on
input_spec.context: string — additional context for the task

dependencies: array of task_ids — tasks that must complete first

example.title: Review auth module for security issues
example.description: Full security and quality review of src/auth/ directory

input_spec.context: Recent changes to auth module after adding 2FA support

validation_criteria: All CRITICAL issues must be addressed
